# Stack

## Runtime

- **Node.js** — 18+ (built-in modules only; no npm dependencies in the plugin itself)
- **Bash** — hook scripts ship a `.sh` fallback alongside the `.js` primary

## Languages

| Language | Role | Key Files |
|---|---|---|
| JavaScript (CJS) | Hook scripts, deterministic tools | `forge/hooks/*.js`, `forge/tools/*.cjs` |
| Markdown | All plugin content — commands, workflows, templates, meta-definitions | `forge/commands/`, `forge/meta/`, `forge/init/` |
| JSON Schema | Store validation, config schema | `forge/schemas/`, `forge/sdlc-config.schema.json` |
| JSON | Plugin manifest, config, store records, migrations | `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `forge/migrations.json` |
| Bash | Hook fallback (unregistered) | `forge/hooks/check-update.sh`, `forge/hooks/list-skills.sh` |

## Plugin Manifest

- **Plugin ID:** `forge@forge`
- **Marketplace:** Entelligentsia private marketplace (`/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`)
- **Manifest:** `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- **Version source of truth:** `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` → `version` field

## Constraints

- No npm dependencies — all hooks and tools use only `fs`, `path`, `os`, `https`, `readline` (built-in)
- Plugin must run on any platform where Claude Code runs (Linux, macOS, Windows)
- Tools ship as pre-built CJS scripts — no compilation step, no language-specific toolchain required in target projects
